#Cell 1: Imports & Spark Session
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, to_timestamp, to_date, upper, trim, lit, current_timestamp

# Optional: tune Spark shuffle partitions
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.shuffle.partitions", "8")

#Cell 2: Define Storage Paths
storage_account = "saazurepractice077"
bronze_path = "abfss://sourcedata@saazurepractice077.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/"
silver_path = "abfss://sourcedata@saazurepractice077.dfs.core.windows.net/Silver/"

#Cell 3: Read Bronze CSV Files
def read_csv(path, file_name):
    return spark.read.option("header", True).option("inferSchema", True).csv(f"{path}/{file_name}")

df_patients = read_csv(bronze_path, "patients.csv")
df_admissions = read_csv(bronze_path, "admissions.csv")
df_diagnoses = read_csv(bronze_path, "diagnoses_icd.csv")
df_icd = read_csv(bronze_path, "d_icd_diagnoses.csv")
df_insurance = read_csv(bronze_path, "insurance.csv")
df_doctors = read_csv(bronze_path, "doctors.csv")
df_departments = read_csv(bronze_path, "departments.csv")

print("All Bronze files loaded successfully!")

#Cell 4: Data Validation
# Validate required columns

def validate_required_columns(df, required_columns, df_name):
    missing = [c for c in required_columns if c not in df.columns]
    print(f"{df_name} missing columns: {missing if missing else 'None ✅'}")

validate_required_columns(df_patients, ["subject_id", "gender", "anchor_age", "anchor_year"], "Patients")
validate_required_columns(df_admissions, ["hadm_id", "subject_id", "admittime", "dischtime"], "Admissions")
validate_required_columns(df_diagnoses, ["hadm_id", "icd_code"], "Diagnoses")
validate_required_columns(df_insurance, ["age", "charges"], "Insurance")
validate_required_columns(df_doctors, ["doctor_id", "doctor_name", "active_flag"], "Doctors")
validate_required_columns(df_departments, ["department_id", "department_name", "active_flag"], "Departments")

# Null & Duplicate checks
print(f"Patients null subject_id: {df_patients.filter(col('subject_id').isNull()).count()}")
print(f"Admissions null hadm_id: {df_admissions.filter(col('hadm_id').isNull()).count()}")
print(f"Insurance negative charges: {df_insurance.filter(col('charges') < 0).count()}")
print(f"Doctors invalid active_flag: {df_doctors.filter(~col('active_flag').isin(['Y','N'])).count()}")
print(f"Departments invalid active_flag: {df_departments.filter(~col('active_flag').isin(['Y','N'])).count()}")

print(f"Duplicate patients: {df_patients.count() - df_patients.dropDuplicates(['subject_id']).count()}")
print(f"Duplicate admissions: {df_admissions.count() - df_admissions.dropDuplicates(['hadm_id']).count()}")
print(f"Duplicate doctors: {df_doctors.count() - df_doctors.dropDuplicates(['doctor_id']).count()}")
print(f"Duplicate departments: {df_departments.count() - df_departments.dropDuplicates(['department_id']).count()}")

print("✅ Validation complete!")

#Cell 5: Clean & Transform Data
# Patients
df_patients_clean = (
    df_patients
    .withColumnRenamed("subject_id", "patient_id")
    .withColumn("gender", upper(trim(col("gender"))))
    .withColumn("anchor_age", col("anchor_age").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("anchor_year", col("anchor_year").cast("int"))
    .dropDuplicates(["patient_id"])
    .filter(col("patient_id").isNotNull())
)

# Admissions
df_admissions_clean = (
    df_admissions
    .withColumnRenamed("hadm_id", "visit_id")
    .withColumn("admittime", to_timestamp(col("admittime")))
    .withColumn("dischtime", to_timestamp(col("dischtime")))
    .withColumn("visit_date", to_date(col("admittime")))
    .dropDuplicates(["visit_id"])
    .filter(col("visit_id").isNotNull() & col("admittime").isNotNull())
)

# Insurance
df_insurance_clean = (
    df_insurance
    .withColumnRenamed("charges", "total_amount")
    .withColumn("total_amount", col("total_amount").cast("double"))
    .withColumn("age", col("age").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("bmi", col("bmi").cast("double"))
    .filter(col("total_amount") >= 0)
)

# Doctors
df_doctors_clean = (
    df_doctors
    .withColumn("doctor_name", trim(col("doctor_name")))
    .withColumn("active_flag", upper(trim(col("active_flag"))))
    .withColumn("experience_years", col("experience_years").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("joining_date", to_date(col("joining_date"), "M/d/yyyy"))
    .dropDuplicates(["doctor_id"])
    .filter(col("doctor_id").isNotNull())
)

# Departments
df_departments_clean = (
    df_departments
    .withColumn("department_name", trim(col("department_name")))
    .withColumn("active_flag", upper(trim(col("active_flag"))))
    .dropDuplicates(["department_id"])
    .filter(col("department_id").isNotNull())
)

print("✅ All datasets cleaned successfully!")

#Cell 6: Join Datasets for Silver Layer
# Join admissions with patients
df_visits = df_admissions_clean.join(
    df_patients_clean,
    df_admissions_clean["subject_id"] == df_patients_clean["patient_id"],
    "left"
)

# Primary diagnosis per visit
df_primary_diagnosis = (
    df_diagnoses
    .filter(col("seq_num") == 1)
    .select("hadm_id", "icd_code")
    .withColumnRenamed("hadm_id", "hadm_id_diag")
    .withColumnRenamed("icd_code", "primary_icd_code")
)

df_visits = df_visits.join(
    df_primary_diagnosis,
    df_visits["visit_id"] == df_primary_diagnosis["hadm_id_diag"],
    "left"
)

# Join ICD descriptions
df_visits = df_visits.join(
    df_icd.select(
        col("icd_code").alias("icd_ref_code"),
        col("long_title").alias("diagnosis_description")
    ),
    df_visits["primary_icd_code"] == col("icd_ref_code"),
    "left"
).drop("hadm_id_diag", "icd_ref_code")

# Diagnoses
df_diagnoses_clean = (
    df_diagnoses
    .withColumn("icd_code", trim(col("icd_code")))
    .withColumn("icd_version", col("icd_version").cast("int"))
    .dropDuplicates(["subject_id", "hadm_id", "icd_code"])
    .filter(col("subject_id").isNotNull())
)

# ICD Descriptions
df_icd_clean = (
    df_icd
    .withColumn("icd_code", trim(col("icd_code")))
    .withColumn("long_title", trim(col("long_title")))
    .dropDuplicates(["icd_code", "icd_version"])
)

print(f"Joined visits dataset: {df_visits.count()} rows")

df_visits.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/visits/")
df_patients_clean.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/patients/")
df_doctors_clean.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/doctors/")
df_departments_clean.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/departments/")
df_insurance_clean.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/billing/")
df_diagnoses_clean.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/diagnoses/")

print("✅ Silver layer saved successfully in PARQUET format!")
